milestones.name: Outline Focus Removal & Clear Buttons
milestones.description: Removed default browser outline focus boxes on all TextInputs using style={ outlineStyle: 'none' } and added close-circle 'x' clear buttons to location fields.

milestones.name: Stopovers & Pricing System
milestones.description: Implemented active Selected Stopover Cards with price inputs (separators on keyup), Custom Stopover Search Add, and Trash Icon Delete.

milestones.name: Local Quarters Itineraries
milestones.description: Configured predefined Analakely -> Ambohidratrimo route to suggest intermediate quarters of passage automatically.

milestones.name: Documentation & Logs Synchronized
milestones.description: README.md, audit.md, and nos_idees.md updated to record the new stopover pricing, customized stopover additions, and clear buttons.

next_steps: Test automated SMS or WhatsApp notifications for booking status.
Implement real-time payment status checking through a Mobile Money API.
